sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (value Int8, converted_value UInt8) ENGINE = Memory;
UPDATE test_table SET converted_value = reinterpret(value, 'UInt8') WHERE value = -1;
SELECT reinterpret(value, 'Float32') AS float_value FROM test_table;
SELECT reinterpret('255', 'UInt8') AS string_to_uint8, reinterpret('3.14', 'Float64') AS string_to_float64;
